main.top-text: IQ Option takes a step forward and makes Classic Options accessible and easy to use via our amazing platform.
main.1-text: Your profit depends on how much an asset price will change in the selected direction. It is therefore unlimited: our traders can make as much as +670% in just a few hours.
main.2-text: With Сlassic options trading you can choose among stocks from the S&P 500 index — an elite list of the top performing US companies.
main.feed: Please share your Feedback with us after trying the service.
